codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the VAL-CROSS-002 revisit regression. The dashboard now avoids saving default history preferences before hydration completes, so a deep-linked route remains the loaded player while pre-existing `leagueback_history_preferences` state survives revisit. The saved-lookups path was not regressed: the new regression test confirms a route-driven successful lookup prepends the routed player while retaining prior saved entries and recency ordering.

summary: Reviewed the feature metadata, worker transcript skeleton, user-testing failure artifact, fix handoff, and commit `c04c14b`. The change is narrowly scoped, preserves route precedence, and adds regression coverage for both persisted history preferences and saved lookups, so I found no blocking or non-blocking issues in this fix.
